goal: Create a Python script scripts/task-stats.py that reads .claude-flow/kanban.json and prints a one-line summary: total tasks, done, failed, pending, total cost. Use argparse with --json flag for JSON output. Include tests in tests/test_task_stats.py.

tree.description: Verify scripts/task-stats.py and tests/test_task_stats.py are already committed and all 12 tests pass.
Push the existing commits to origin/master.
